message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

interface "QuestReward" as QuestReward << (I,#b39ddb) >>
note top of QuestReward
interface since QuestRewards need to have RewardPlayer but that logic will vary from reward to reward
end note
QuestReward : + void RewardPlayer()
QuestReward : + String ToString() so that the reward can be described in text in the quest window

class "Quest" as Quest << (A,#b2ebf2) >>
Quest : + bool isActive
Quest : + bool isComplete
Quest : # [SerializedField] string name
Quest : # [SerializedField] string description
Quest : # [SerializedField] List<QuestReward> questRewards
Quest : {abstract} make sure it does not derive from monobehaviour
Quest : {abstract} all classes that inherit from quest need the [Serializable] attribute

class "RivalQuest" as RivalQuest << (C,#c8e6c9) >>
RivalQuest : {abstract} rival quests will need their own unique logic and AI

class "CountQuest" as CountQuest << (C,#c8e6c9) >>
CountQuest : - int currentCount
CountQuest : - [SerializedField] int completionCount
CountQuest : + void checkWin() sets isComplete to true if currentCount == completionCount

enum "CountQuestTypes" as CountQuestTypes << (E,#ffab91) >>
CountQuestTypes : GrindTime, Graffiti, SpeedMeter, Coins, Enemies

class "QuestGiver" as QuestGiver << (C,#c8e6c9) >>
QuestGiver : {abstract} attaches to NPC objects, derives from monobehaviour
QuestGiver : - [SerializedField] Quest questToGive;
QuestGiver : - [SerializedField] GameObject questWindow
QuestGiver : - [SerializedField] TextMeshProUGUI titleText
QuestGiver : - [SerializedField] TextMeshProUGUI descText
QuestGiver : - [SerializedField] TextMeshProUGUI rewardText;
QuestGiver : {abstract} not sure if the player will need its own new quest script of if questing logic can go in an existing one
QuestGiver : - PlayerReference player;
QuestGiver : + void OpenQuestWindow()
QuestGiver : + void AcceptQuest()
QuestGiver : + void CompleteQuest()

class "MonoBehaviour" as MonoBehaviour << (C,#c8e6c9) >>
MonoBehaviour : Unity MonoBehaviour

' Relationships
QuestReward *-- Quest : has
QuestReward *-- RivalQuest : has
QuestReward *-- CountQuest : has

RivalQuest --|> Quest : inherits from
CountQuest --|> Quest : inherits from

CountQuest *-- CountQuestTypes : has

QuestGiver *-- Quest : gives
QuestGiver --|> MonoBehaviour : inherits from

@enduml
```
